How it works

💳
Pay with Card
Secure hosted checkout via Lemon Squeezy. Accepts all major cards globally.
🪙
Pay with Crypto
BTC, ETH, USDT and 100+ cryptocurrencies accepted via Cryptomus.
⚡
Instant credits
Credits are added to your account automatically after payment confirmation.
